title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jorah Mormont sets sail alongside his prisoner, Tyrion. Later, Cersei makes a move against the Tyrells, while Jaime and Bronn sneak into Dorne.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Daenerys apprehends the leaders of Meereen's great families, while Jon confronts a challenging decision. Later, Theon must face Sansa.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda feels like a teenage girl again when her dentist gives her braces. Meanwhile, Samantha is jealous of a 13-year-old, wealthy client who seems to have skipped the teen years altogether.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda believes she has been stood up until she learns her date died of a heart attack. Later, she agrees to go to the wake and meets a man who used to date Carrie.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Distressed by a hateful glance from Natasha, who observes the quartet in a restaurant, Carrie becomes disoriented and falls victim to theft.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie and Samantha address issues with disruptive neighbours. Meanwhile, Miranda fears that the takeaway attendant laughs at her for placing single-person orders.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Chris and Cousin Tony conduct investigations to ensure old secrets remain concealed. Meanwhile, Janice endangers her marriage with her fierce temper.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Cousin Tony departs to avenge his close friend's death. Meanwhile, a dream reveals to Tony the necessary actions to prevent a full-scale war.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: An uncomfortable party prompts a partial reconciliation between Tony and Carmela. Meanwhile, cousin Tony accepts an offer he deems irresistible.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Tony discovers his cousin desires a larger share of responsibilities. Meanwhile, Finn makes an embarrassing revelation about Vito.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: When the quartet is invited to an engagement party, Carrie and Miranda feel like outcasts. Meanwhile, Samantha interacts with a television agent, but soon switches her attention to a Franciscan.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie and Stanford meet Lynn Cameron, an old friend, who is producing a New York fashion show featuring real models. Subsequently, she insists Carrie model in the show for her.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda is dating Doug, a respected professional, but just can't get comfortable with his loose sense of toilet intimacy. Meanwhile, On a 'non-date' with Mr. Big Carrie meet Jazz musician Ray King.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie has another date with Ray King at his place and confesses she does not really like jazz, because it makes no sense. Later, she tells the girls she had the most intense orgasm in her life.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda feels the presence of a ghost in her apartment. Meanwhile, Carrie feels haunted when she gets an invitation for the new bar owned by Steve Brady and her former lover Aiden Shaw.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Samantha's lover Warren is great in all aspects, but addicted to something the quartet hates. Meanwhile, Miranda finds an attractive man while training for the marathon.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: Detective Mare Sheehan attends a celebration for her legendary high school basketball win and connects with Richard, a professor who is new in town.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: As a video from the night of the crime surfaces, Mare questions suspects in the case and gives an icy welcome to county detective Colin Zabel who is called in to assist.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: While Mare and Colin analyse new evidence, a recorded call leads to an unlikely suspect. Meanwhile, after Mare attacks Helen because of a possible custody battle, she receives advice from Richard.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: With Mare forced to take a backseat on the case, Colin presses a local priest about the vague circumstances that prompted his transfer to the parish.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: Mare opens up about her family history during therapy sessions. Meanwhile, Lori tries to get to the bottom of her son's outburst at school.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: Mare returns to work and immediately takes care of the murdered girl. Meanwhile, during investigations, the victim's bike is found in the river and the policewoman has to face the demons of her past.

title: Mare of Easttown
subTitle: When her investigation takes a series of devastating turns, Mare's friends and family members process the fallout as she attempts to finally find her own way forward.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Faded television starlet Valerie Cherish attempts to land a role in a new sitcom, Room and Bored, by taking part in a reality show chronicling her somewhat mortifying comeback.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: The cast flies to New York City to introduce the media to Aunt Sassy and her attractive charges. As that happens, the ever bubbly Valerie gets a reality check on just how far her star has fallen.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: After a table read for the first official episode, Valerie invites her young costars to a bonding meal, but Juna doesn't show up. However, the two make up later with personal lunch.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie fights to change a potentially offensive line written for Aunt Sassy.

title: Elementary
subTitle: Sherlock must face his past when he travels to London to revisit an old case; Watson learns more about Sherlock's pre-New York life; Sherlock's brother, Mycroft, reveals some secrets.

title: Elementary
subTitle: A mathematician who was trying to decipher a highly guarded equation is murdered; a former patient's son asks Watson for a loan.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Arya is put to the test, while Tyrion and Jorah are cunningly captured by slavers. Later, Loras Tyrell is judged by the Sparrows.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon heads east as trouble begins to stir for Sam and Gilly at Castle Black. Meanwhile, Cersei savours her triumph over the Tyrells as new plots develop in the shadows.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Sansa compels Theon to reveal a secret while Cersei maintains her stubbornness. Furthermore, Jon and Tormund convene with the wildling elders.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon and the wildlings return to Castle Black and Jaime meets with Doran Martell. Meanwhile, Daenerys attends the grand reopening of the fighting pits.

subTitle: Tony reviews a colleague's retirement request. Meanwhile, Hesh attempts to get compensation for an injustice done to his son-in-law.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: The family tries to cope with Tony's hospitalisation and deteriorating condition. Meanwhile, Tony begins to hallucinate a new life parallel to his own.

title: The Sopranos
subTitle: Silvio divides the spoils of Paulie's new stint and later, suffers a critical asthma attack. As the family begins to slowly crack from the inside, Vito sees himself as a potential new leader.

subTitle: Carrie finally gives her house key to Aidan. However, he still feels kept out of her life when she refuses to accept a new laptop from him after hers broke down mysteriously.

subTitle: Valerie accidentally overhears the writers mercilessly mocking her and the panicked team hastily writes her a full episode in fearful anticipation of potential retribution.

subTitle: Valerie and Mark head to the desert for a long weekend in Palm Springs. Meanwhile, Mark draws the line with Jane's crew on the golf course.

subTitle: While investigating the murder of a financial CEO, a woman from Sherlock's past emerges as a possible suspect.

subTitle: Richard, a computer programmer, must choose between a deal with Gavin Belson and Peter Gregory. Similarly, both want his cooperation to make his super-compressing algorithm change the world.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard hires Jared to design a business plan. Meanwhile, Big Head is asked to work for Gavin Belson, where he discovers that Hooli has stolen the Pied Piper algorithm and rebranded it as Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The partners run into trouble with their company name when they discover it is already taken. Subsequently, Erlich searches for a new name in another dimension of his consciousness.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard drunkenly promises to make Erlich a board member, a decision he regrets the next morning. Meanwhile, Big Head finds others at Hooli who, like him, have made careers out of doing nothing.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Since Pied Piper is the official company name, Erlich wants a logotype and hires an artist for the job. Meanwhile, Richard faces a tighter deadline for the project after a mistake.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard discovers a problem in the code writing and hires Kevin to write the code for him.

subTitle: Richard has trouble getting Pied Piper ready in time for the TechCrunch Disrupt. Meanwhile, Erlich realises he slept with the wife of one of the judges of the contest.

subTitle: Pied Piper makes it to the next stage of Disrupt but runs into trouble with Hooli's presentation. Meanwhile, Richard tries to pull the company together before the big presentation.

subTitle: Monica painfully struggles to deal with her new boss. Meanwhile, Richard makes an important decision about the company's future.
